description: I'm a motivated Computer Engineering graduate from Trident Academy of Technology (Class of 2025), with a deep passion for building modern web applications.
My expertise lies in Python full-stack development — from backend APIs with Django to dynamic frontends. I love turning ideas into clean, working software.
Outside of code, I've been an active member of the College Cultural Committee, which sharpened my communication and leadership skills.

features.title: Goal Oriented
features.description: Focused on delivering clean, efficient solutions to real-world problems.

features.title: Team Player
features.description: Experienced working in teams, sharing ideas and hitting goals together.

features.title: Fast Learner
features.description: Continuously learning new technologies and frameworks to stay current.

features.title: Problem Solver
features.description: Strong analytical mindset — breaks down complex problems into simple steps.

projects.title: Django Blog Platform
projects.description: A full-featured blog application built with Django. Includes user authentication, CRUD posts, comments, and an admin dashboard. Styled with Bootstrap.

projects.title: Student Data Analyzer
projects.description: A data analysis tool using Pandas and NumPy to process student records, generate insights, visualize grade distributions, and export reports.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio site built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript. Features smooth animations, responsive layout, and modern UI design to showcase skills and projects.

projects.title: OOP Management System
projects.description: A Python-based library management system demonstrating OOP principles — encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism — with file-based data persistence.

projects.title: E-Commerce REST API
projects.description: RESTful API backend for an e-commerce platform using Django REST Framework. Features product listings, cart, and order management endpoints.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: A responsive weather dashboard that fetches live data from a public API and displays temperature, humidity, and weekly forecasts with dynamic UI updates.

education.institution: Trident Academy of Technology · Odisha, India
education.description: Specialized in Full Stack Development, Data Structures, OOP, and Database Management. Active member of the College Cultural Committee.
Completed Higher Secondary education with focus on Science and Mathematics, building a strong analytical foundation.
Completed foundational schooling with a strong academic record and participation in extracurricular activities.
